creator: daniel@shafer.cc
text:
Created attachment 198014
x11/guake port patch

I have updated the port x11/guake to 3.4.0, converted to use PyPi (CHEESESHOP) and worked with the Python team to make it adhere to the proper standards.

As this port has not been updated in years, I would also like to volunteer to take full maintainership of the port.

Attached is the diff to update the port in the ports tree.
